name: conservation-scorecard
title: Conservation Practice Adoption Scorecard
subtitle: adoption rate, practice mix & provider agreement
description: A conservation-insight showcase — overall adoption gauge, acreage mix by practice, adoption by provider, a practice×provider agreement heatmap, and adoption vs target by practice.

dataAccesses.name: AdoptionKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS adoption_pct, SUM(acres) AS enrolled_acres, COUNT(DISTINCT practice) AS practices, COUNT(DISTINCT provider) AS providers FROM v_practice_adoption

dataAccesses.name: OverallAdoption
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS adoption_pct FROM v_practice_adoption

dataAccesses.name: AcresByPractice
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT practice, SUM(acres) AS acres FROM v_practice_adoption GROUP BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AdoptionByProvider
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT provider, ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS pct FROM v_practice_adoption GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: PracticeProviderGrid
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT practice, provider, ROUND(AVG(pct),0) AS pct FROM v_practice_adoption GROUP BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: AdoptionVsTarget
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT practice, ROUND(AVG(pct),0) AS pct, ROUND(AVG(target_pct),0) AS target_pct FROM v_practice_targets GROUP BY 1

kpis.label: Adoption Rate
kpis.info: Common-estimate adoption rate across all practices and providers.

kpis.label: Enrolled Acres
kpis.info: Total acreage covered by a tracked conservation practice.

kpis.label: Practices Tracked
kpis.info: Distinct conservation practices in the dataset.

panels.title: Overall Adoption
panels.info: Blended adoption rate across every practice and provider.

panels.title: Enrolled Acres by Practice
panels.info: Where enrolled acreage sits across the four tracked practices.

panels.title: Adoption by Provider
panels.info: Each provider's own estimate of the overall adoption rate.

panels.title: Practice × Provider Agreement
panels.info: Where providers agree on adoption — and where estimates diverge.

panels.title: Adoption vs Target
panels.info: Each practice's adoption rate against its program target.
